name: Build tech-eduagent-db skill (scoped-repo / profileId-safety / migration-rollback discipline) [F-114]
description: No repo-local skill codifies createScopedRepository / profileId write-protection / migration-rollback discipline / db:push-vs-migrate split. Reduce-and-extend vs tech/drizzle-atomicity + tech/neon-postgres.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .agents/skills/tech/eduagent-db/SKILL.md (sync to .claude/skills/tech-eduagent-db/). REDUCE: cite tech/drizzle-atomicity (atomic SQL, onConflictDoUpdate, transactions/locks) + tech/neon-postgres (connection/branching) by reference. EXTEND: (1) createScopedRepository(profileId) — when to use vs parent-chain join, with services/session/session-topic.ts as canonical example; (2) profileId write-protection as a hard WHERE-clause requirement; (3) migration rollback discipline (the ## Rollback section requirement + data-loss accounting); (4) db:push:dev (dev-only) vs drizzle-kit migrate (stg/prod) split. Trigger-only description. DoD: human review of skill content before merge.
bodyText:
Reduce-and-extend
tech/drizzle-atomicity covers atomicity/transactions; tech/neon-postgres covers connection/branching — cite both. The gap is the repo data-access contract: scoped-repo vs parent-chain, profileId write protection, the ## Rollback + push-vs-migrate rules from AGENTS.md §Non-Negotiable + §Schema And Deploy Safety. Gate: PRG-03 B4 cleared.
Note
Skill-content design is human-led — executor authors, operator reviews before merge.
